Here's what we covered in this module. First we talked about how the real business of direct response is after the first sale. Then we talked about the big thinking mistake that most marketers make, the idea of more of the same. We talked about optimizing your back end. We talked about why you must be prolific with product and offer creation. So here's what to do now. First decide what your first back end offer is going to be. Then write the sales copy for the offer, of course developing a hook and promise first. Then create that back end product and test the offer to your customer list.
